parameters.query:
WITH matched AS (
  SELECT id, doc_no, file_name, file_type, category, status, source,
         size_bytes, chunk_count, line_user_id, uploaded_at, updated_at, error_message
  FROM contracts c
  WHERE (($1::text IS NULL OR $1 = '')
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(file_name,'')) LIKE '%' || LOWER($1) || '%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(category,'')) LIKE '%' || LOWER($1) || '%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(source,'')) LIKE '%' || LOWER($1) || '%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(doc_no,'')) LIKE '%' || LOWER($1) || '%')
    AND ($2::text IS NULL OR $2 = '' OR status = $2)
  ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
  LIMIT $3::int OFFSET $4::int
)
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(matched)), '[]'::json)::text AS data_json,
       COUNT(*)::int AS count
FROM matched

SELECT c.id, c.doc_no, c.file_name, c.file_type, c.category, c.status, c.source, c.size_bytes, c.chunk_count, c.line_user_id, c.line_group_id, c.line_message_id, c.uploaded_at, c.updated_at, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', ch.id, 'chunk_index', ch.chunk_index, 'preview', LEFT(ch.content, 200), 'token_count', ch.token_count) ORDER BY ch.chunk_index) FROM contract_chunks ch WHERE ch.contract_id = c.id) AS chunks FROM contracts c WHERE c.id = $1::uuid

UPDATE contracts SET file_name = COALESCE(NULLIF($2, ''), file_name), category = NULLIF($3, ''), source = NULLIF($4, ''), status = COALESCE(NULLIF($5, ''), status), updated_at = now() WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, doc_no, file_name, file_type, category, status, source, size_bytes, chunk_count, line_user_id, uploaded_at, updated_at

DELETE FROM contracts
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, file_name, storage_bucket, storage_path,
  CASE 
    WHEN storage_path LIKE 'http%' AND storage_path LIKE '%/' || storage_bucket || '/%'
    THEN split_part(storage_path, '/' || storage_bucket || '/', 2)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS minio_key;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE status='ready') AS ready, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE status='pending') AS pending, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE status='failed') AS failed

SELECT id, file_name, file_type,
  COALESCE(
    file_mime,
    CASE
      WHEN lower(COALESCE(file_type, '')) = 'pdf' THEN 'application/pdf'
      WHEN lower(COALESCE(file_type, '')) = 'png' THEN 'image/png'
      WHEN lower(COALESCE(file_type, '')) IN ('jpg', 'jpeg') THEN 'image/jpeg'
      WHEN lower(COALESCE(file_type, '')) = 'txt' THEN 'text/plain; charset=utf-8'
      ELSE 'application/octet-stream'
    END
  ) AS file_mime,
  encode(file_data, 'base64') AS file_data_b64,
  octet_length(file_data) AS file_size
FROM contracts
WHERE id = $1::uuid
